markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new tool designs and the V1 UI for the Brex Resources Hub.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Charge Finder Approved:** The tool is approved for development, but with critical data corrections. The team must remove customer-identifying numbers from charge variations and delete the "customers charged per month" metric to avoid legal risks.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Resources Hub V1 Reviewed:** The new hub UI was reviewed. Key feedback includes adding "View All" buttons to content sections and preparing for a potentially contentious internal review, as the design represents a major site overhaul.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Case Studies Page Redesign:** The current page will be redesigned to fix its poor UX and add a requested "industry" filter, creating a new template for other content pages like eBooks.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Topics

### Charge Finder Tool

  - [**Status:** Approved for development.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Critical Data Corrections:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Remove customer-identifying numbers from charge variations (e.g., `AMZN MKTPL IND-PRIVIA`).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Delete the "customers charged per month" metric.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid legal risks and provide a cleaner, more accurate user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Design Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Approved the overall design, layout, and "Instantly" orange color.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** For large companies (e.g., Amazon), show only the top 10–20 most common charge variations.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [Built programmatically by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Will be hosted in the Brex repo, with Kirkland gaining necessary Slack access.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**URL Structure:** `brex.com/tools/charge-finder/[company-name]`](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Brex Resources Hub V1 UI Review

  - [**Goal:** Consolidate all Brex content into a single, navigable hub.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Breadcrumbs and sticky nav for easy navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Content tagged by category, topic, and persona.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Sections for featured articles, topics, tools, and trends.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Feedback & Revisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Hero Section:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
          - [Reduce font size of "Insights, Tools, and Guides" subtitle.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
          - [Make article CTAs (e.g., "Read Now") more prominent.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Content Sections:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
          - [Add "View All" buttons to each section (e.g., Topics, Tools, Webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
          - [Increase image size in the "Explore Topics" section.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
          - [Remove outdated content (e.g., old podcasts, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
          - [Add a dedicated "Case Studies" section.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
          - [Consider limiting "Spend Trends" categories to the top 4 performers.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Internal Review Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The hub's design is a major site overhaul and will require approval from the Chief Design Officer (Bingo).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
      - [**Action:** Jon will prepare for the review by comparing the new design to the current site to justify the changes.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Case Studies Page Redesign

  - [**Problem:** The current case studies page has poor UX and significant white space.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [**Requirement:** Segment Marketing requested an "industry" filter be added.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**Solution:** Redesign the page to fix its UX and add the filter. This new, improved layout will then serve as a template for other content pages (e.g., eBooks, blog).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Correct Charge Finder data (remove customer IDs, delete customer count metric).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
      - [Implement Charge Finder in the Brex repo.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [Revise Resources Hub UI based on feedback (font sizes, CTAs, "View All" buttons).](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Add a "Case Studies" section to the hub.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [Redesign the Case Studies page with the "industry" filter.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [Prepare for the internal review of the Resources Hub UI.](https://fathom.video/share/_UrPTKGS6BCwdnWZ3hugg2TrYhmwW-jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
